Sir [[Jared Rutledge]] was a minor [[House Mecetti]] noble from the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. He had a brooding nature and was said to be a loner.<ref name="LOTE" />

Jared was a covert operative for House Mecetti. He was equally competent in working the underbelly of society as well as mixing with the noble elite. A patient man, Jared did not like to take unnecessary risk. He was loyal to his house but was not beyond making deals with his enemies if it achieved his objectives.<ref name="LOTE" />
